title: How Live Entertainment Venues Capture Events That Drive Ticket Sales
excerpt: There's event video that gets posted and does nothing for ticket sales. Then there's the kind that stops people mid-scroll. The difference isn't the event — it's the strategy.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Crowd energy at St. Augustine Amphitheatre live show

content.alt: Crowd moment captured at live music event
content.caption: Crowd moments are what convert — people buy tickets to be part of something

content.alt: Stage lights at outdoor concert venue
content.caption: The wide establishing shot communicates scale and atmosphere

seo.title: Live Entertainment Venue Video That Drives Ticket Sales
seo.description: How live entertainment venues in Florida capture event video that actually drives ticket sales. Strategy, shot types, and audio approaches that work.
